title: Simple Wither Buff
description: Gives some simple buffs to the wither, nothing overkill
body:
Simple datapack that gives minor buffs to the wither, making it a bit more similar to bedrock edition

### **Changes**
- Doubles withers HP 300 --> 600 (Same as bedrock)
- At half HP the wither does a second explosion and summons 3 wither skeletons (Same as bedrock)
